programs.title: The Monuments Men
programs.desc: George Clooney's fact-based World War II comedy-drama starring Matt Damon. Art experts form a unit to stop the Nazis stealing or destroying important cultural artefacts.

programs.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
programs.desc: Taron Egerton returns as the newest recruit to the stylish secret agency Kingsman for more ass-kicking comedy action. A star-studded cast includes Julianne Moore and Elton John.

programs.title: Polite Society
programs.desc: Nida Manzoor's kick-ass martial-arts anti-romcom stars Priya Kansara as a college student and wannabe stuntwoman who wants to save her older sister from an undesirable marriage.

programs.title: Our Ladies
programs.desc: Raucous teen comedy. A group of Catholic school girls hit Edinburgh for a choir competition, but they're more interested in debauchery than singing.
